name: Top 15 Directories Where You Should List Your Marketing Agency: Get New Clients In 2026
description: Learn how to improve your marketing agency’s visibility in 2026. Discover the top 15 directories to list and attract more clients with effective strategies.
main_title: Grow Your Agency: 15 Directories to Attract Clients in 2026
richtext:
If you’re not listed in a marketing agency directory, you’re leaving money on the table practically every day. Business owners struggling to improve foot traffic and sales go online every day searching for solutions. According to a survey by Aurora Project, 50% of businesses like these end up with a digital marketing agency like yours. But you won’t show up in searches for 'top digital marketing agencies’ unless you're listed and locally optimized.

Being discoverable on a trusted digital marketing agency directory is non-negotiable. This guide will show you the 15 best directories to list your marketing agency in 2026.

How Can Agency Directories Help Drive Good Business

Listing your agency in a marketing agency directory improves your business’s visibility, builds credibility, and drives leads directly to your inbox. Here's how:

Improves Visibility

Being on a digital marketing agency directory puts your business in front of the right audience. Brands with multiple locations seek regional experts—online directories can connect you.

Provides Credibility

Ever googled a business, saw it on a trusted platform, and thought, “I think they'd be legit”? That’s the power of directories. Listings on high-authority sites like Clutch or G2 act like a badge of trust for your marketing agency profile.

Improved SEO Results

Search engines love directories too. Backlinks from a well-regarded marketing agency directory can significantly boost your website rankings. Yes, they're no-follow backlinks but Google is evolving no-follow links in a way that adds more impact. Clients searching for “top SEO agency” are more likely to land on your page through your directory listings. 

Simplified Search Process for Clients

Directories organize options by services, location, and reviews, making them accessible to a large number of potential clients.

Promoting Long-Term Growth

Directories don’t just generate short-term leads. They’re a long-term strategy. As your profile garners reviews and traffic, you attract steady client inquiries.

Top 15 Marketing Agency Directories

These top 15 marketing agency directories for 2026 include full digital marketing agency directories to specialized ones like an SEO agency directory. 

  1.  Clutch
  • Reach: 1.4 million monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free basic profile, paid sponsorship options.
  • Domain Authority (DA): 76

Clutch is a widely recognized directory for agencies that want to reach a well-paying audience. Focusing on verified client reviews and featuring over 500,000 listings, it's a great directory for credibility. Agencies are ranked by client satisfaction, services offered, and industry expertise. 

If you’re an SEO agency, their detailed filters help you stand out in a crowded field. Additionally, getting a paid sponsorship plan can push your profile to the top, ensuring premium visibility.

  1. 4A’s 
  • Reach: 2.1 million monthly visitors. Trusted by 600+ member agencies representing over 1,200 office locations in the U.S.
  • Payment Plan: Paid memberships start at $3,250/year.
  • Authority Score: 43

For a credible marketing agency directory, get listed with the American Association of Advertising Agencies (4A's). With hundreds of members, including agencies, brands, publishers, and ad tech providers, it’s the perfect platform for ad-focused agencies to connect with top clients seeking creative and strategic solutions.

4A’s has non-agency partners like Amazon Ads, Google, Meta, TikTok, BlockGraph, Microsoft Advertising, Innovid, and more. 

Pro Tip: Looking for more ways to scale your marketing agency with partnerships? Check out Top White Label Reseller Programs for Marketing Agencies to explore white-label solutions that can help you expand your offerings without additional overhead.

  1. DesignRush
  • Reach: Over 1.1 million monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free and premium plans.
  • Authority Score: 63

DesignRush is perfect for creative and branding agencies. It categorizes agencies by specialties like web design, SEO, and digital marketing, so businesses find exactly what they need. It's a B2B marketplace for agencies, and only top-notch marketing agencies are listed. They also focus on helping companies and connecting them to the right partners. 

While it is free to register on this platform, DesignRush has a premium agency sponsorship package that lets you unlock all premium features and powerful insights to boost sales. This package gives you access to over 300,000 B2B companies seeking partnerships. Currently, DesignRush features over 30,000 total agency listings.

  1. Yelp
  • Reach: Over 193 million monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free listing; advertising and connect options starting at $200 and $299/month 
  • Domain Authority (DA): 100

Yelp is primarily known for restaurants and service businesses. But it’s also a valuable marketing agency directory where agencies can display reviews, photos, and services on their profiles. 

Although Yelp is primarily known as a local business review platform, it is now gaining traction in listing marketing agencies. With over 5,000 agencies already listed and five popular service categories, getting your agency listed here can significantly boost your visibility and credibility. 

  1.  AgencySpotter
  • Reach: 30,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free and premium plans 
  • Authority Score (DA): 31

As its name suggests, AgencySpotter makes it easy for potential clients to find the right agency within seconds. They use verified reviews to rank listed agencies. The more reviews you have, the better your chances of discoverability. This directory focuses solely on marketing agencies. 

If you handle projects like design, web development, and SEO, AgencySpotter is an excellent directory to list on. Listing in their directory is free, but agencies can pay for premium packages starting at $233/month to boost visibility. Premium members also gain access to enhanced visibility, analytics, and the opportunity to appear in curated lists like “Top Agencies of the Year.”

  1. UpCity
Source: Upcity 
  • Reach: Over 250,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free and paid plans, starting at $150/month.
  • Authority Score: 44

Founded in 2009, UpCity focuses on location-based searches, connecting local businesses with marketing agencies in their city. This platform isn’t just a marketing agency directory—it’s a comprehensive B2B directory catering to advertising agencies, SEO services, digital marketing agencies, graphic design agencies, social media marketing agencies, and PPC services. It also offers solutions for niche categories like software development, video production, web design, website development, and public relations (PR).  

UpCity has over 50,000 listed providers. If you're wondering whether it’s free or paid, here’s the deal: a basic profile is free. However, to unlock more features, agencies can opt for the Certified Partner status, which comes with additional perks.

  1.  Adforum
  • Reach: Over 100,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Paid plans start at $63/month; creative library of $33/month
  • Authority Score: 65.

AdForum features over 24,000 agencies and has a creative library with more than 235,000 past campaigns. This directory makes searching for agencies simple and efficient. Whether you’re looking for a digital, PR, boutique, or social media agency, you’ll find them all on their platform. 

Need the latest news about the advertising industry? They’ll get you covered with a content hub full of valuable insights. While a basic listing is free, their premium plans start at $63 per month, offering even more benefits.  

  1.  Credo
  • Reach: 50,000+ monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Paid plans starting at $297/month.
  • Domain Authority (DA): 54.

Credo specializes in matching businesses with vetted SEO agencies and digital marketing professionals. It only accepts agencies with exceptional work, so if you meet their standards, you should definitely consider listing on Credo. Instead of a bidding process, Credo matches you with the right clients based on the information you provide. This means it’s crucial to give accurate and detailed information about your agency to get the most out of the platform.

Credo supports services like PPC, SEO, Google Ads, content marketing, Amazon advertising, and Facebook Ads. Unlike other directories, Credo handles the entire matching process for each client and doesn’t offer public searches. As a result, they don’t provide free listings. Pricing information must be requested directly from their website. 

  1.  Google Partner Directory
  • Reach: 5,400 monthly active users 
  • Payment: Free for certified Google Partners.
  • Authority Score: 77

As the ultimate digital marketing agency directory, Google Partner Directory is a must for agencies offering PPC, SEO, and Google Ads services. However, while this is a new platform, the reach and authority score is still quite low. But it's a great directory to list given Google’s global dominance.

Certification as a Google Partner unlocks this listing. The directory also has a certification feature where agencies list their areas of certifications for credibility purposes. 

  1. Winmo
  • Reach: Over 62,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Paid plans starting at $399/month.
  • Authority Score: 58

Winmo goes beyond traditional agency directories. It stands tall and is one of the top sales intelligence platforms. Just like other directories, this platform provides deep insights into marketing and advertising agencies. Perfect for multi-location businesses, Winmo provides detailed decision-maker data, including email addresses and job roles. This means you can pitch to the right people at the right time.

As a lead generation directory, listing on Winmo provides you with the opportunity to close more deals. Winmo is recommended for small agencies as it provides an avenue to reach the right audience faster and close more deals. There are over 1500 other small agencies listed on Winmo. There are no free services on Winmo. It’s subscription-based. 

  1.  Sortlist
  • Reach: Over 147,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free basic plan; paid options starting at $50/month.
  • Authority Score: 45.

Sortlist focuses on simplifying the matchmaking process between businesses and agencies. It’s especially beneficial for agencies in branding, web development, and SEO directories. Sortlist has a searchable directory that uses AI technology to connect customers to the most suitable agencies. 

With over 1000 agencies and popular categories like digital strategy, UI/UX design, performance marketing and branding, this directory stands out. When needed, this platform provides free consultations. However this doesn't mean it's a free marketing agency directory. It is primarily paid for. 

  1. 99firms
Source: 99firms 
  • Reach: Over 25,000 monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free and premium plans.
  • Domain Authority (DA): 41.

99firms is a business directory with a sole focus on technology and marketing service providers. It offers extensive listings with detailed company information and user reviews. There are over a thousand well-vetted agencies on this platform. The most popular agency niche categories on 99firms include Tech Marketing, B2B Marketing, SaaS Marketing, Startup Marketing, and Enterprise Solutions. 

If your agency is just starting out and your budget is small, you can get listed here as they have a free plan. But to get the best result, you need a paid version.

  1. Spona 
  • Reach: 30,000+ monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free basic listing; premium plans start at $99/month.
  • Authority Score: 48.

Spona is a rising star in the marketing agency directory world. It’s tailored for small to mid-sized marketing agencies looking for local and international exposure. With categories spanning SEO, PPC, and digital strategy, Spona’s matchmaking algorithm connects agencies with businesses actively seeking their services. 

Just the same way agencies are vetted on this platform, customers are vetted as well. This is just a way to provide both parties a painless process. With 5 years as a service provider, they have over 9,000 listings with around 40000 digital services offered. 

  1. TechBehemoths
  • Reach: 92,000+ monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Free and paid options starting at $49/month.
  • Authority Score: 44.

TechBehemoths connects businesses with agencies specializing in tech-related services like app development, AI, and SEO directories. TechBehemoths’ most recent niche additions are Web Design, eCommerce, Mobile Apps and PHPWordPress. 

This directory is used globally which means you get the chance to be in the face of thousands of clients. Just like most marketing agency directory on this list, TechBehemoths provides paid and free plans for agencies interested in listing on their platform. Agencies are ranked based on certifications, client reviews, and expertise in cutting-edge technology. 

  1. Digital Agency Network
Source: DigitalAgencyNetwork 
  • Reach: 41,000+ monthly visitors.
  • Payment: Paid plans starting at $199/month.
  • Domain Authority (DA): 45

DAN is not just a digital marketing agency directory. They provide news, blog articles, and editorials. This means if you list your marketing agency here and provide good services, you might get the chance to get featured in the news which is a win for you. 

The directory also has over 41,000 visitors each month, focusing on every type of digital marketing, from SEO and branding, to PPC, social media, and even mobile advertisement. As a marketing agency, there's a 30-day free trial, after which membership plans start at $450/year

‍

Summing Up

The right marketing agency directory can change how potential clients find your agency. Each directory offers unique strengths—whether it’s local visibility, global reach, or niche specialization. From free basic listings to premium plans packed with perks, these platforms cater to every budget.

Remember, it’s not just about being listed; optimize your profiles, collect and respond to reviews, and stay updated. However, if regularly updating your listing gets overwhelming, Try Synup to streamline your directory listings and enhance your local SEO strategy today.

‍

Top 15 Directories Where You Should List Your Marketing Agency: FAQs

What is the benefit of a directory?

A directory is like a digital map for your agency. It is a place where your potential customers come to search for trustworthy and reputable agencies to work with. Plus, it helps improve your SEO, thus helping your website rank higher on search engines.    

How often should I update my agency listings?

You must update your listings when there is a major update with your agency. But even if nothing has changed, set a reminder to review them every 3-6 months. This way, you ensure everything stays accurate and relevant. Also, you get to notice if there’s any issue that can jeopardize how potential customers see your agency.

‍
